title: Performance Management Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger performance management foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Performance Management Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Performance Management Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good performance management foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Performance Management Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
